description: This is a test suite for the Offcanvas component, testing its behavior, configuration, event handling, and integration with jQuery. It includes setup and teardown routines, multiple test cases for methods like show, hide, toggle, and dispose, as well as data-api interactions.

classes.name: Offcanvas
classes.description: Main class representing the Offcanvas component, with methods for showing, hiding, toggling, disposing, and static methods for instance retrieval.

methods.name: getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Offcanvas instance associated with a DOM element, or null if none exists.

methods.name: getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Offcanvas instance or creates a new one with optional configuration.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the offcanvas element, handling focus trap activation and event dispatching.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the offcanvas element, releasing focus trap and dispatching events.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the offcanvas element.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the offcanvas instance, cleaning up event listeners and DOM references.
